title: navarretia viscidula var. purpurea
intro: Navarretia viscidula var. purpurea, commonly known as purple sticky-pod or purple navarretia, is a rare, flowering plant species in the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Navarretia viscidula var. purpurea include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant activity, contributing to its potential as an herbal remedy for various conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of Navarretia viscidula var. purpurea include infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used to address skin issues, respiratory complaints, and digestive problems.
